findings.title: North Star Metric: Events Processed Per Day
findings.description: This metric represents the total number of events processed by the DataPipe platform on a daily basis, serving as a key indicator of the platform's overall performance and user engagement.
assumptions: Increased events processed indicates higher platform utilization.
recommendations: Monitor this metric closely to assess platform scalability.

findings.title: Primary KPI: Services on EOL Dependencies
findings.description: This metric tracks the number of services that are currently using end-of-life dependencies, which poses a risk to the platform's stability and security.
assumptions: Reducing EOL dependencies will improve platform security.
recommendations: Implement a plan to update or replace EOL dependencies.

metadata.measurement_method: Count of services with EOL dependencies

findings.title: Guardrail Metric: Critical CVEs Open
findings.description: This metric indicates the number of critical Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) that are currently open, which must not increase to maintain platform security.
assumptions: Keeping critical CVEs closed is essential for platform integrity.

findings.title: Measurement Gap: Dependency Health Overview
findings.description: There is currently no centralized view of dependency health across the platform, leading to reactive management of EOL and CVE issues.
assumptions: A centralized dashboard will improve proactive management of dependencies.

evidence.excerpt: There is no centralized view of dependency health across the platform.

recommendations: Develop a dependency health dashboard to visualize and manage dependencies effectively.

findings.title: Experiment Opportunity: CVE Resolution Impact
findings.description: Conduct an experiment to measure the impact of resolving critical CVEs on platform performance and user satisfaction.
assumptions: Resolving CVEs will lead to improved user trust and platform reliability.
recommendations: Set up A/B testing to compare user engagement before and after CVE resolutions.

summary: The analysis identifies key metrics for DataPipe, including a North Star metric focused on events processed per day, primary KPIs related to EOL dependencies, and guardrail metrics for critical CVEs. Additionally, a significant measurement gap exists in dependency health management, and an experiment opportunity is proposed to assess the impact of CVE resolutions.
